abstract: Retrieves the keychain search list for a specified preference domain.

declaration.code: func SecKeychainCopyDomainSearchList(_ domain: SecPreferencesDomain, _ searchList: UnsafeMutablePointer<CFArray?>) -> OSStatus

overview:
## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

## Discussion

A preference domain is a set of security-related preferences, such as the default keychain and the current keychain search list. Use this function if you want to retrieve the keychain search list for a specific preference domain. Use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainCopySearchList(_:)] function if you want the keychain search list for the current preference domain. See the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSetPreferenceDomain(_:)] function for a discussion of current and default preference domains.

# SecKeychainCopyDomainSearchList(_:_:)

**Function**

Retrieves the keychain search list for a specified preference domain.

## Declaration

```swift
func SecKeychainCopyDomainSearchList(_ domain: SecPreferencesDomain, _ searchList: UnsafeMutablePointer<CFArray?>) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **domain**: The preference domain from which you wish to retrieve the keychain search list. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecPreferencesDomain] for possible domain values.
- **searchList**: On return, a pointer to the keychain search list of the specified preference domain.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

## Discussion

A preference domain is a set of security-related preferences, such as the default keychain and the current keychain search list. Use this function if you want to retrieve the keychain search list for a specific preference domain. Use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainCopySearchList(_:)] function if you want the keychain search list for the current preference domain. See the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSetPreferenceDomain(_:)] function for a discussion of current and default preference domains.
